prophecies.a: 基于《但以理书》8:14「到二千三百日，圣所就必洁净」，将「日」解释为「年」，从公元前457年（亚达薛西王颁布重建耶路撒冷圣殿的敕令）起算2300年，得出基督将于约1843年复临地球，届时以火洁净世界。
prophecies.a_en: Based on Daniel 8:14 — 'Unto two thousand and three hundred days; then shall the sanctuary be cleansed' — interpreting 'days' as 'years' and counting 2,300 years from 457 BC (the decree of Artaxerxes to rebuild the Jerusalem temple), Miller concluded that Christ would return around 1843 to cleanse the world by fire.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 1843年过去后基督并未复临。米勒本人最初给出的时间窗口为1843年3月21日至1844年3月21日（犹太历年），该期间内无任何超自然事件发生。
prophecies.verdict_en: Christ did not return in 1843. Miller's original time window was March 21, 1843 to March 21, 1844 (Jewish calendar year), during which no supernatural events occurred.

prophecies.a: 《但以理书》9:24-27「七十个七」（490年）从公元前457年起算，490年后即公元33年——恰好对应耶稣受难的传统纪年。米勒以此论证公元前457年为正确起算点，进而支撑2300年计算的可靠性。
prophecies.a_en: Daniel 9:24-27's 'Seventy Weeks' (490 years), counted from 457 BC, reaches AD 33 — precisely matching the traditional date of Christ's crucifixion. Miller used this to validate 457 BC as the correct starting point, thereby supporting the reliability of his 2,300-year calculation.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 490年的计算确实从公元前457年到公元33年，与多数学者对耶稣受难年份的推测一致。但这仅证明起算点的合理性，不能证明「2300日等于2300年」的解释方法正确。将「日」等同于「年」的解经方式在圣经学术界存在广泛争议。
prophecies.verdict_en: The 490-year calculation from 457 BC to AD 33 does align with most scholars' estimates for the crucifixion. However, this only validates the starting point, not the interpretive method of equating 'days' with 'years.' The day-year principle remains widely disputed in biblical scholarship.

prophecies.q: 1843年3月21日—1844年3月21日：基督复临的时间窗口
prophecies.a: 米勒预言基督将在犹太历5803年（对应公历1843年3月21日至1844年3月21日）内复临。他声称：「我充分相信，在1843年某个时候，从上帝的宝座到这个荣耀的国度，耶稣基督将第二次降临。」
prophecies.q_en: March 21, 1843 – March 21, 1844: the window for Christ's return
prophecies.a_en: Miller predicted Christ would return during Jewish year 5803 (March 21, 1843 to March 21, 1844). He declared: 'I am fully convinced that sometime between March 21st 1843 and March 21st 1844, according to the Jewish mode of computation of time, Christ will come.'
prophecies.verdict_zh: 1844年3月21日过后，预言窗口期内基督并未复临。米勒本人承认计算可能存在误差，但仍坚信基督复临即将到来。
prophecies.verdict_en: March 21, 1844 passed without Christ's return. Miller acknowledged possible errors in his calculation but maintained his belief that the Second Coming was imminent.

prophecies.a: 在1844年3月21日过后，米勒运动内部重新计算，将犹太历赎罪日（Karaite calendar）定为新的复临日期，即1844年4月18日。
prophecies.q_en: April 18, 1844: revised date for Christ's return
prophecies.a_en: After March 21, 1844 passed, Millerites recalculated using the Karaite Jewish calendar and set April 18, 1844 as the new date for Christ's return.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 1844年4月18日同样平静度过，无任何超自然事件发生。这是米勒运动的第二次日期修正失败。
prophecies.verdict_en: April 18, 1844 also passed uneventfully, with no supernatural events. This was the second date revision failure for the Millerite movement.

prophecies.a: 米勒运动追随者塞缪尔·斯诺（Samuel S. Snow）提出「第七个月运动」，将赎罪日重新定位为1844年10月22日，宣称这是基督必定复临的最终日期。米勒本人在临近日期时也接受了这一计算。数万信徒变卖家产、放弃庄稼，在户外等候基督从天降临。
prophecies.q_en: October 22, 1844: the final date of 'The Great Disappointment'
prophecies.a_en: Millerite follower Samuel S. Snow proposed the 'Seventh Month Movement,' recalculating the Day of Atonement as October 22, 1844, declaring it the definitive date of Christ's return. Miller himself accepted this calculation near the date. Tens of thousands of believers sold possessions, abandoned crops, and waited outdoors for Christ's descent from heaven.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 1844年10月22日过后，一切如常，基督并未复临。数万信徒经历了巨大的心理创伤，史称「大失望」（The Great Disappointment）。信徒亨利·爱蒙斯记述：「我们哭泣、哭泣，直到天亮。」这是美国宗教史上最大规模的预言落空事件。
prophecies.verdict_en: October 22, 1844 passed without incident. Tens of thousands of believers experienced profound psychological trauma in what became known as 'The Great Disappointment.' Follower Henry Emmons recorded: 'We wept, and wept, till the day dawn.' This remains the largest-scale prophetic failure in American religious history.

prophecies.q: 奥斯曼帝国衰亡的预言
prophecies.a: 米勒运动传教士约西亚·利奇（Josiah Litch）基于《启示录》9:15解释，预言奥斯曼帝国将在1840年8月11日丧失独立主权。他将经文中「一时、一日、一月、一年」计算为391年15天，从1449年起算得出此日期。
prophecies.q_en: Prophecy of the Ottoman Empire's fall
prophecies.a_en: Millerite preacher Josiah Litch, interpreting Revelation 9:15, predicted that the Ottoman Empire would lose its independent sovereignty on August 11, 1840. He calculated the scriptural 'an hour, a day, a month, and a year' as 391 years and 15 days, counting from 1449.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 1840年7月15日，英、俄、普、奥四国签订《伦敦条约》干预奥斯曼帝国事务。9月初奥斯曼接受欧洲列强调停。虽然日期和事件细节并非完全吻合（帝国并未在8月11日当天覆灭），但利奇的追随者将此视为重大应验，极大推动了米勒运动的发展。历史学家认为这一「应验」更多是对复杂外交事件的选择性解读。
prophecies.verdict_en: On July 15, 1840, Britain, Russia, Prussia, and Austria signed the Treaty of London intervening in Ottoman affairs. The Ottoman Empire accepted European mediation in early September. While the date and details did not precisely match (the empire did not fall on August 11), Litch's followers claimed vindication, greatly boosting the Millerite movement. Historians consider this 'fulfillment' a selective reading of complex diplomatic events.

prophecies.q: 世界末日将以火焰降临
prophecies.a: 米勒预言基督复临时，世界将被烈火洁净。依据《彼得后书》3:10「主的日子要像贼来到一样；那日，天必大有响声废去，有形质的都要被烈火销化」，地球将在一场超自然大火中毁灭并重建为新天新地。
prophecies.q_en: The world will end in fire
prophecies.a_en: Miller predicted that at Christ's return, the world would be cleansed by fire. Based on 2 Peter 3:10 — 'the day of the Lord will come as a thief in the night; in which the heavens shall pass away with a great noise, and the elements shall melt with fervent heat' — the Earth would be destroyed in a supernatural conflagration and remade as a new heaven and new earth.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 1843-1844年间地球并未发生任何超自然火灾或末日事件。世界照常运转。
prophecies.verdict_en: No supernatural fire or apocalyptic event occurred on Earth during 1843-1844. The world continued as normal.

prophecies.a: 根据《帖撒罗尼迦前书》4:16-17，米勒宣称基督复临之时，历代已故的义人将首先从坟墓中复活，随后在世的信徒将与他们一同被提升天，与主永远同在。
prophecies.q_en: The dead shall rise from their graves
prophecies.a_en: Based on 1 Thessalonians 4:16-17, Miller proclaimed that at Christ's return, the righteous dead of all ages would first rise from their graves, then living believers would be caught up together with them in the clouds to meet the Lord and remain with Him forever.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 1843-1844年间没有任何可观察到的死者复活事件。该预言属于超自然宣称，与可观测现实完全不符。
prophecies.verdict_en: No observable resurrection of the dead occurred during 1843-1844. This prediction was a supernatural claim entirely unsupported by observable reality.

prophecies.a: 米勒预言在基督复临的那一刻，真正的信徒将被「被提」（Rapture）——在空中与基督相遇，身体瞬间转变为不朽的荣耀之体，永远脱离尘世的苦难。他劝诫追随者要时刻预备，免得错过这一荣耀时刻。
prophecies.q_en: The saints shall be raptured into heaven
prophecies.a_en: Miller predicted that at the moment of Christ's return, true believers would be 'raptured' — meeting Christ in the air, their bodies instantly transformed into immortal, glorified forms, forever freed from earthly suffering. He urged followers to be ever ready lest they miss this glorious moment.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 1843-1844年间未发生任何被提事件。「大失望」当夜，信徒们在户外等待至天明，无人升天。
prophecies.verdict_en: No rapture occurred during 1843-1844. On the night of the 'Great Disappointment,' believers waited outdoors until dawn — no one ascended.

prophecies.a: 米勒将1833年11月13日的狮子座流星暴（每小时数万颗流星划过夜空）解释为《马太福音》24:29「众星要从天上坠落」的应验，作为基督复临在即的征兆之一。他还引用1780年5月19日的「新英格兰黑日」（白天天空突然变暗）作为「日头变黑」的实证。
prophecies.q_en: Signs of the end: celestial phenomena
prophecies.a_en: Miller interpreted the Leonid meteor storm of November 13, 1833 (tens of thousands of meteors per hour streaking across the night sky) as fulfillment of Matthew 24:29 — 'the stars shall fall from heaven' — and cited it as a sign of Christ's imminent return. He also referenced the 'New England Dark Day' of May 19, 1780 (when the daytime sky suddenly darkened) as evidence of 'the sun being darkened.'
prophecies.verdict_zh: 1833年狮子座流星暴和1780年新英格兰黑日均为真实历史事件。但现代科学已给出自然解释：流星暴由坦普尔-塔特尔彗星尘埃轨道引起，黑日则由大规模森林火灾烟雾和云层组合导致。这些天象确实发生，但并非超自然征兆。
prophecies.verdict_en: The 1833 Leonid meteor storm and the 1780 New England Dark Day were real historical events. However, modern science provides natural explanations: the meteor storm was caused by the debris trail of Comet Tempel-Tuttle, and the Dark Day resulted from massive forest fire smoke combined with cloud cover. These celestial events did occur, but were not supernatural signs.

prophecies.q: 但以理书预言的四大帝国解读
prophecies.a: 米勒将《但以理书》第2章和第7章的异象解读为四个世界帝国的依次更替：巴比伦（金头）→ 波斯（银胸）→ 希腊（铜腹）→ 罗马（铁腿）。在第四帝国（罗马）分裂为十个王国之后，上帝将建立永恒的天国——即基督复临的时刻。
prophecies.a_en: Miller interpreted the visions of Daniel chapters 2 and 7 as four successive world empires: Babylon (head of gold) → Persia (chest of silver) → Greece (belly of bronze) → Rome (legs of iron). After the fourth empire (Rome) divided into ten kingdoms, God would establish an eternal heavenly kingdom — the moment of Christ's return.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 四帝国更替的历史解读（巴比伦、波斯、希腊、罗马）与主流历史学和多数圣经学者的解释基本一致，这一解读并非米勒独创。但从「罗马分裂为十国」推导出「基督将于1843年复临」的逻辑跳跃，缺乏充分依据。
prophecies.verdict_en: The historical interpretation of four successive empires (Babylon, Persia, Greece, Rome) broadly aligns with mainstream history and most biblical scholars — this reading was not original to Miller. However, the logical leap from 'Rome divided into ten kingdoms' to 'Christ will return in 1843' lacks sufficient basis.

prophecies.a: 米勒依据《但以理书》7:25和《启示录》13:5，将教皇权力的统治期计算为1260年（「一载、二载、半载」= 3.5年 = 1260日/年）。从公元538年（东罗马灭东哥特王国、教皇获得世俗权力）起算，至1798年（拿破仑将军贝蒂埃逮捕教皇庇护六世），恰好1260年。米勒以此作为圣经时间预言可靠性的证据。
prophecies.q_en: Rise and fall of papal power
prophecies.a_en: Based on Daniel 7:25 and Revelation 13:5, Miller calculated papal rule as lasting 1,260 years ('a time, times, and half a time' = 3.5 years = 1,260 day-years). Counting from AD 538 (when the Eastern Roman Empire defeated the Ostrogoths and the Pope gained temporal power) to 1798 (when Napoleon's General Berthier arrested Pope Pius VI) yields exactly 1,260 years. Miller cited this as proof of the reliability of biblical time prophecies.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 538年和1798年均为真实历史节点：538年东罗马确实击败东哥特王国，1798年贝蒂埃确实逮捕了庇护六世。间隔恰好1260年也是事实。但将这两个事件分别定义为教皇权力的「起始」和「终结」存在简化之嫌——教皇权力的兴衰是一个渐进过程，而非可以精确到某一年的事件。此外，教皇制度在1798年后并未终结，至今仍存续。
prophecies.verdict_en: Both AD 538 and 1798 are real historical dates: the Eastern Roman Empire did defeat the Ostrogoths in 538, and General Berthier did arrest Pius VI in 1798. The 1,260-year interval is factually correct. However, defining these specific events as the precise 'start' and 'end' of papal power is an oversimplification — the rise and fall of papal authority was a gradual process, not events datable to exact years. Furthermore, the papacy did not end in 1798 and continues to this day.

prophecies.q: 米勒的最终信念：基督复临仍将到来
prophecies.a: 「大失望」之后，米勒虽承认日期计算有误，但至死未放弃基督即将复临的信念。他在1845年写道：「虽然我在指定确切时间上犯了两次错误，但我对基督复临的信心丝毫未减。我只是在等候，每日每时期盼着主的降临。」
prophecies.q_en: Miller's final conviction: Christ's return will still come
prophecies.a_en: After the Great Disappointment, Miller acknowledged his date calculations were wrong but never abandoned his belief that Christ's return was imminent. He wrote in 1845: 'Although I have been twice disappointed, I am not yet cast down or discouraged... I have fixed my mind upon another time, and here I mean to stand until God gives me more light — and that is Today, TODAY, and TODAY.'
